Researcher completed. Key verified findings that inform the architect's brief:

- **LinkedIn**: Requires absolute HTTPS URLs for `og:image`. Min 1200x627px. PNG/JPG only (no WebP). Caches for 7 days — use Post Inspector to re-scrape. Include `og:image:width` and `og:image:height`.
- **Twitter/X**: `twitter:card` is the ONLY tag with no OG fallback — must be explicitly declared. Everything else falls through from OG.
- **Google sitemap**: Drop `<changefreq>` and `<priority>` — Google ignores them. Only `<loc>` required; `<lastmod>` only if accurate.
- **GitHub Pages**: 10-min CDN cache (Fastly). Version OG image filenames on update to bypass caches. CORS is permissive (`*`), no issues for OG images.

### Research Validation

| Dependency / Topic | Current Status | Key Finding |
|---|---|---|

- All CSS remains inline -- existing pattern across all 10 pages
- Meta tags inserted between `<title>` and `<style>` -- cleanest head location

- Image assets in `docs/public/img/` -- established convention

### Trade-offs
| Gain | Give Up |
|---|---|
| LinkedIn shows proper title, description, and image | ~500 bytes extra HTML per page |
| Google/search engines get proper descriptions and sitemap | Two new root-level files require test modification |

**Skills:** playwright-cli-helpers, playwright-cli, frontend-design

## Edge cases

- **LinkedIn cache**: After deploying, use LinkedIn Post Inspector (https://www.linkedin.com/post-inspector/) to force re-scrape. LinkedIn caches for 7 days.
